emails.body:
AFCEA SIGNAL Weekly Update
September 30, 2026

---

TOP STORIES

1. Building the Cyber Workforce of 2030
New DoD CIO guidance emphasizes cross-training and industry partnerships to close the 40,000-person gap in cyber billets. Article includes interview with USCYBERCOM J7 on revised qualification standards.
Read more: https://signal.afcea.example/cyber-workforce-2030

2. Data Fabric Lessons from Project Convergence 2026
After-action review highlights how mesh architectures reduced sensor-to-shooter latency by 62% in Indo-Pacific vignettes. Key takeaway: semantic interoperability matters more than transport layer.
Read more: https://signal.afcea.example/data-fabric-pc26

3. Zero Trust Implementation: Service-Level Progress Reports
Army, Navy, and Air Force submit first quarterly scorecards under DoD Zero Trust Strategy. Common challenge: legacy application refactoring timelines.
Read more: https://signal.afcea.example/zt-scorecards-q3

---

UPCOMING EVENTS

• SIGNAL Webinar: "AI-Assisted Spectrum Management" — Oct 7, 1300 ET
• AFCEA TechNet Indo-Pacific — Oct 21-23, Honolulu
• Chapter Leadership Symposium — Nov 4-5, Arlington

---

MEMBER BENEFITS

New this month: Complimentary access to CSIS "Defense Innovation" report series for SIGNAL subscribers. Log in at members.afcea.example to download.

---

You are receiving this as a current SIGNAL subscriber. Update preferences or unsubscribe: https://signal.afcea.example/preferences

AFCEA SIGNAL | 4400 Fair Lakes Court, Fairfax, VA 22033

AFCEA SIGNAL Member Bulletin
October 3, 2026

• San Diego: "Unmanned Systems in Littoral Ops" — Oct 6, 1700-1900, USS Midway Museum
  Panel with PEO Unmanned Aviation and 3rd Fleet
  Register: https://chapters.afcea.example/sandiego/littoral-oct6

• Tampa Bay: Cyber Threat Intelligence Sharing — Oct 7, 0730-0900, MacDill AFB
  Breakfast briefing with USCYBERCOM J2
  Register: https://chapters.afcea.example/tampa/intel-oct7

WEBINAR REMINDERS

1. "AI-Assisted Spectrum Management" — Oct 7, 1300 ET
   Dr. Lisa Costa (USSF CTO) and Mr. Paul Tilghman (DARPA)
   1.5 CPE credits | Register: https://webinars.afcea.example/spectrum-oct7

2. "Software Factory Metrics That Matter" — Oct 14, 1000 ET

3. "Resilient Comms in Contested Environments" — Oct 21, 1400 ET
